.venv\Lib\site-packages\pydantic\v1\dataclasses.py:5:Behind the scene, a

.venv\Lib\site-packages\pydantic\v1\dataclasses.py:10:When a pydantic 
dataclass is generated from scratch, it's just a plain dataclass
.venv\Lib\site-packages\pydantic\v1\dataclasses.py:13:The tricky part if

.venv\Lib\site-packages\pydantic\v1\dataclasses.py:16:@dataclasses.dataclas
s

.venv\Lib\site-packages\pydantic\dataclasses.py:115:    A decorator used 
to create a Pydantic-enhanced dataclass, similar to the standard Python 
`dataclass`,
.venv\Lib\site-packages\pydantic\dataclasses.py:118:    This function

.venv\Lib\site-packages\pydantic\dataclasses.py:121:        _cls: The 
target `dataclass`.

.venv\Lib\site-packages\pydantic\dataclasses.py:123:            
`dataclasses.dataclass` when appropriate. If specified, must be set to 
`False`, as pydantic inserts its
.venv\Lib\site-packages\pydantic\dataclasses.py:126:        eq: Determines 
if a `__eq__` method should be generated for the class.
.venv\Lib\site-packages\pydantic\dataclasses.py:128:        unsafe_hash:
